headline: 2 Healthcare Stocks with Solid Fundamentals and 1 Facing Challenges
summary: Healthcare companies are pushing the status quo by innovating in areas like drug development and digital health. Shareholders who bet on the industry have seen decent returns lately as healthcare stocks were up 3.8% over the past six months, almost identical to the S&P 500.
